practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the move rule
practiceChallenge.description: Edit the code so the helper returns the correct pointer move for each comparison.
hints: When the sum is too small, you need a bigger number.
When the sum is too large, you need a smaller number.
Use the words left, right, and found.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. Your move rule matches the visible tests.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck which pointer changes the sum in each case.

blanks.label: Move when the sum is too small
Move when the sum is too large
Move when the sum matches the target
